channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: VP Sara Duterte questions government focus amid rising debt and unemployment
item.description: Vice President Sara Duterte criticized the Marcos administration over the country's growing debt and unemployment during a speech in The Hague, Netherlands. She pointed out that the government is not ...

item.title: Jonathan Says He Will Consult Before Deciding on 2027 Presidential Race
item.description: Former President Goodluck Jonathan don cause political wahala again as him talk say e go consult well well before e decide whether to run for 2027 presidential election or not. Since 2023, plenty peop...

item.title: Vilakazi urges Pirates to stay focused as title race remains open
item.description: Orlando Pirates legend Benedict “Tso” Vilakazi has reminded the Buccaneers that the Absa Premiership title is not yet secured, despite recent results giving them an edge. Following Mamelodi Sundowns’ ...

item.title: Beauty brand highlights how marketing inflates skincare prices through supermarket analogy
item.description: A beauty brand is using a clever supermarket-style pop-up to highlight how inflated pricing in skincare often has little to do with the actual product. Amy Bi, global vice president of brand at Deciem...

item.title: Tanzania and Russia Launch Program to Strengthen Digital Governance and Economy
item.description: Tanzania and Russia don start one cooperation programme wey aim at improving digital governance and promoting digital sovereignty. The partnership also dey support Tanzania's goal to become fully digi...

item.title: High Court Blocks Standard Chartered’s Attempt to Revive IPTL Appeal Over UK Judgment
item.description: The High Court Commercial Division in Dar es Salaam has dismissed an application by Standard Chartered Bank seeking more time to pursue an appeal in a long-running dispute involving Independent Power ...

item.title: Ex-Minister Saleh Mamman Convicted Over N33.8bn Mambilla Project Fraud
item.description: Dem so happen say the former Minister of Power, Saleh Mamman, don finally waka enter gbege after Federal High Court for Abuja don find am guilty on 12-count charges wey concern money laundering worth ...

item.title: Michael Beasley’s Journey After the NBA: BIG3 League, International Play, and Media Work
item.description: Michael Paul Beasley Jr., born on 9 January 1989 in Cheverly, Maryland, is a former NBA star who continues to shine in basketball even after leaving the league. As of 2026, he is a key player and co-c...

item.title: Becoming a European Lightsaber Champion: Precision, Strategy and Community
item.description: A French fencing enthusiast has become the top-ranked lightsaber duellist in Europe, combining years of fencing experience with a love of Star Wars. Starting fencing at five and later transitioning to...

item.title: Enforcement Directorate Names Punjab AAP Chief in Connection with Land Use Scam Investigations
item.description: The Enforcement Directorate (ED) on Thursday identified Aam Aadmi Party's Punjab chief, Aman Arora, in relation to a land scam and alleged money laundering case, according to reports. The raids were c...

item.title: African Bank cancels acquisition of Eskom staff home loan portfolio to focus on consolidation
item.description: African Bank has decided to halt its planned acquisition of Eskom’s staff home loan portfolio, a deal valued at around R5.7 billion, which was first announced in December 2024. According to the bank, ...

item.title: Telus call centre agents express concerns over AI co-pilot and job security
item.description: Call centre agents at Telus in British Columbia are expressing growing anxiety about the company's increasing use of AI tools, particularly an AI 'co-pilot' required for all retention calls. Employees...

item.title: Singer Bonnie Tyler in hospital in induced coma after emergency intestinal surgery
item.description: Bonnie Tyler, the renowned Welsh singer, has been placed in an induced coma following emergency intestinal surgery. The 74-year-old, originally from Skewen, Wales, was rushed to a hospital near her re...

item.title: British Airways parent reassures on sufficient jet fuel availability for summer operations
item.description: British Airways' parent company has expressed confidence in the stability and reliability of its jet fuel supply for the upcoming summer months. Despite recent concerns in the aviation industry about ...

item.title: Hantavirus outbreak confirmed on MV Hondius cruise ship in Argentina, British travellers warned
item.description: Health authorities have confirmed a hantavirus outbreak aboard the MV Hondius cruise ship, which departed from Argentina on 1 April 2026. The World Health Organisation (WHO) reports five confirmed cas...

item.title: Oburu Oginga Absent From ODM Events Due to Ill Health; Opposition Strategies Take Shape
item.description: On Friday, May 8, Kenyan newspapers focused on the absence of ODM leader Oburu Oginga from several important political events, raising questions over his health and availability. The Siaya senator has...

item.title: Jaime Pressly joins OnlyFans to connect with fans and explore new creative opportunities
item.description: Jaime Pressly, best known for her Emmy-winning role as Joy Turner in the sitcom 'My Name Is Earl,' has joined the adult content platform OnlyFans at the age of 48. Pressly, who has maintained a steady...

item.title: Mexican Researchers Develop New Antibiotics from Scorpion Venom and Habanero Peppers to Fight Drug-Resistant Bacteria
item.description: Researchers at the National Autonomous University of Mexico (UNAM) have made significant progress in the fight against antibiotic-resistant bacteria by developing three new compounds derived from natu...

item.title: Flight operations at Islamabad Airport to face short delays this weekend
item.description: ISLAMABAD: Passengers planning to travel through Islamabad airport this weekend should be prepared for possible flight delays due to operational reasons, as informed by the Pakistan Airports Authority...

item.title: Trump Says U.S. Warships Passed Through the Strait of Hormuz During Iranian Attack
item.description: President Donald Trump said three U.S. warships successfully transited the Strait of Hormuz while coming under fire from Iran, describing the episode as a sign of both the danger and the effectiveness...
